auth.agreeTermsBefore: I have read and agree to the

auth.forgotSuccessClick: Click the link to reset your password.
auth.forgotSpam: Didn't find it? Check your spam folder.
auth.resetInvalid: Invalid or expired link. Request a new one.
auth.resetSuccess: Password changed successfully. Redirecting to sign in…

auth.completeSubtitle: To continue, enter your full name and create a password for your account.

passwordValidation.summary: Password must be at least 8 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols.
passwordValidation.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
passwordValidation.needLowercase: Password must include at least one lowercase letter.
passwordValidation.needUppercase: Password must include at least one uppercase letter.
passwordValidation.needDigit: Password must include at least one number.
passwordValidation.needSymbol: Password must include at least one symbol (!@#$%^&* etc.).
passwordValidation.placeholder: Min. 8 characters: upper, lower, numbers & symbols

platform.referralBanner: Invite a friend — you both earn rewards

mfaGate.title: Two-step verification
mfaGate.intro: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, etc.).

triCurrency.ariaLabel: Prices: Brazilian real (reference), Japanese yen (Japan base), US dollar (charge)
triCurrency.ariaLabelUsdPrimary: Prices: US dollar (main display), Japanese yen (Japan base), Brazilian real (reference)
triCurrency.usdPrimaryTitle: Main amount in US dollars (charge or approximate from yen/real rates)
triCurrency.usdApproxHint: USD is approximate when converted from yen or real for display.
triCurrency.brlTitle: Amount in Brazilian real (reference for you)

quoteList.perItemLikeStandard: Per-item fee (same as standard forwarding, {{count}} item(s))

dashboard.greeting: Hi, {{name}}. Here is a snapshot of your account.
dashboard.notifHint: You will get a notification when your order status changes.
dashboard.cardShipmentsDeliveredTitle: Delivered at home — history in Lounge → Shipments
dashboard.addressTitle: Our address for shipping your orders
dashboard.addressIntro: Use this address at Japanese stores (Amazon, Rakuten, Mercari, etc.) as the delivery destination. The recipient line must be your name and code (below). Packages arrive with us and we consolidate before shipping to you.
dashboard.referralThemBody: when they sign up with your link, they receive a coupon in their coupon box in the payments hub and can use it to get up to {{amount}} off an eligible order.
dashboard.referralYouBody: when your referral completes shipping for the order where they used the referral coupon (status shipped or completed in the system), you receive {{amount}} in wallet credit.
dashboard.referralStats: Referrals: {{total}} • Awaiting your credit (e.g. after their shipment): {{awaiting}} • Credit already earned: {{rewarded}}

lounge.intro: Your hub for orders, shipments, my products, and wishlist — full tools in one place.

orders.orderNotFound: We could not find the selected order.
orders.loginToPay: Please sign in again to pay
orders.invoiceDownloadError: Could not download the invoice for this order.
orders.extraPickOne: Select at least one option (photos or video).
orders.intro: All orders on your account in two lists: In progress groups every order that is not yet completed; Completed shows only finished orders. The Lounge Shipments tab adds a shipping-focused view. Pay in the Payments hub.
orders.emptyCompleted: You do not have any completed orders on this account yet.
orders.emptyOpen: You have no orders in progress yet (all non-completed orders appear here).
orders.itemsUnavailable: Order line items unavailable right now.
orders.invoicePending: The invoice is attached automatically after payment is confirmed.
orders.extrasHint: Request photos and/or video of the received product.
orders.shipSeparate: Shipping charged in a separate step (storage)
orders.prepayNote: You asked to prepay early to reduce the risk of the item selling out before purchase (e.g. flea market).
orders.prepayWalletLine: Total debited from wallet for prepayment:
orders.prepayWalletTotalPending: Total to debit from wallet for prepayment:
orders.earlyPrepayPendingExplain: Confirm the wallet debit on this order (amount set when you submitted the request).
orders.earlyPrepayPaySuccess: Prepayment debited from your wallet successfully.
orders.earlyPrepayWalletPaid: Wallet prepayment for this order is complete.
orders.earlyPrepayPayHint: Use the button below to debit this amount from your JPY wallet on this order.
orders.invoiceAutoNote: The invoice is attached automatically after payment is confirmed.
orders.paymentSubtitle: Choose how to pay and complete securely.
orders.payFooterHint: Parcelow: Brazil checkout. Stripe: international card.

wishlist.intro: Add items by link and track prices. External product links only — for store purchases, use the Payments hub.
wishlist.toggleManualShow: Or add manually (link, name, and price)
wishlist.manualHint: Items appear in your list below. Add as many as you want and refresh prices anytime.
wishlist.updateScrapeError: Could not refresh. Use “Edit item” to update manually.
wishlist.empty: Your wishlist is empty. Paste a link above to get started.

inventory.metaDescription: Items received and stored in your account. Request shipping from the Shipments flow.
inventory.intro: Items received and stored in your account. To request shipping, use the Shipments flow.
inventory.purchaseSuccess: Purchase successful! Your products are here. The order appears in your order history.
inventory.empty: You have no inventory items yet. When your packages are received and confirmed, they will appear here.
inventory.shippingBannerBody: To request shipping, open Shipments and complete the step-by-step flow.

cart.metaDescription: Pay store orders, shipping, and pending charges in one place.
cart.intro: Pay everything for your account here: store orders, shipping, and pending amounts.
cart.cartSubtitle: Review items before completing your purchase.
cart.triFootnoteRates: USD shown after server rates are updated.
cart.stockOverNotice: You entered {{qty}} unit(s), but only {{count}} are in stock for this product.
cart.stockLineOutOfStock: This product shows zero stock. You can keep it in the cart, but the order may be adjusted at payment.
cart.grupoFeeBody: {{percent}}% on the USD subtotal of group items + {{perUnit}} per unit ({{qty}} units, reference ¥{{feeJpy}}/unit) — {{total}} on the order total.
cart.triFootnoteCheckout: BRL highlighted for readability; JPY = Japan base; USD = charge (e.g. Parcelow).
cart.triFootnoteCheckoutPending: Charge USD appears when rates and products are updated on the server.
cart.pendingSubtitle: Orders waiting for payment to continue.

errors.noStoreItems: No store items to complete checkout.

cart.modalSubtitle: Choose whether to use your wallet and how to pay any remaining balance.
cart.modalBrlNote: BRL is indicative (USD × rate). Your bank may charge a slightly different BRL amount.
cart.modalParcelowHint: Parcelow: charge in USD. Stripe follows JPY in this flow.
cart.modalWalletCustomError: Enter how much wallet (JPY) to use, or choose “Use maximum wallet amount”.

paymentHistory.introBefore: Payment history for shipping and services. Wallet top-ups appear under
paymentHistory.usdChargeFootnote: USD charge (Parcelow). BRL/¥ are indicative when the order has totals.

invoices.intro: Invoices are issued automatically after payment is confirmed (order marked paid). USD is the transactional reference; BRL is approximate per the rate at issuance.
invoices.empty: No invoices yet. They appear when an order is paid.

affiliate.intro: Promote the platform with your link and track clicks, conversions, and commissions.

conta.subtitle: Your details, addresses, and security settings
conta.confirmRemoveKyc: Remove this document from your profile?
conta.kycMaxFiles: You already uploaded the maximum of {{max}} documents. Remove one to upload another.
conta.kycProfileUpdateFail: File removed from storage, but updating the profile failed. Please contact support.
conta.mfaCodeHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your app.
conta.mfaUnenrollConfirm: Are you sure you want to turn off two-factor authentication?
conta.passwordReauthFail: Could not verify your current password. Please sign in again.
conta.kycIntro: In some cases — payments, fraud prevention, or partner requirements — we may ask for proof of identity. You can get ahead by uploading documents here (optional): for example national ID or driver's license (front and back in separate files if you prefer), or another official photo ID.
conta.kycFormats: Files are stored in restricted storage for your account and authorized staff only. Accepted formats: JPG, PNG, WebP or PDF, up to 10 MB each. Maximum {{max}} files.
conta.oauthPasswordNote: You signed in with an external provider (Google, etc.). Your password is managed by that provider. To regain access, use “Forgot password” on the sign-in screen with your email.
conta.mfaIntro: Use Google Authenticator or another compatible app to add an extra layer of security.
conta.mfaScanHint: Scan the QR code with your app or enter the secret manually:
conta.sessionIntro: Signing out will require you to log in again on this device.

wallet.intro: Your balance can pay shipping, store items, and services.
wallet.topupPaymentSubtitle: Main amount in JPY with USD/BRL references from the JPY → USD → BRL pipeline.
wallet.topupParcelowUnavailable: Wallet top-up is Stripe-only. Parcelow remains for orders in the Payments hub.
wallet.topupMethodsFootnote: Each gateway shows its own accepted payment methods.

pixTopup.sentSuccess: Receipt sent! We will verify and credit your balance as soon as possible.
pixTopup.title: Wallet top-up via PIX
pixTopup.subtitle: Pay with PIX and upload your receipt. We will verify and credit your balance as soon as possible.
pixTopup.pixKeyHelp: PIX key (copy and paste in your bank app)
pixTopup.sendReceiptHint: After paying, upload an image of your receipt below.

store.empty: No products available at the moment.
store.triUpdatingFootnote: BRL/USD rates updating — USD shows after the next refresh.
store.ctaBody: Didn’t find what you need in stock? We can buy it for you in Japan.

storeHub.intro: Showcase buying groups and in-stock items on the same page.

groupBuy.intro: Scheduled buying groups and the in-stock catalog on the same page.
groupBuy.noProductsLinked: This group does not have linked products yet.

services.urlMustBeHttp: Use a full URL starting with http:// or https://
services.urlHttpOnly: Use an http or https URL.
services.urlInvalid: Invalid URL. Please check the address.
services.orderNotEmpty: Describe your request in the text box or attach at least one reference image.
services.orderNotEmptyAssisted: Use the link budget above, add notes in the text box, or attach reference images.
services.prepayMinJpy: Enter how much to pay from wallet (minimum ¥1).
services.earlyPrepayProductsMin: Enter the total product amount in yen (minimum ¥1).
services.earlyPrepayMessageRequiresLinks: Include at least one product link (http or https URL) in the description.
services.earlyPrepayMessageHint: Required: in the description above, state the total value of the products and paste the link for each item (shop, listing, auction, etc.) so we can purchase later.
services.earlyPrepayMessageHintBudget: Put links in the link budget above or in the description; the yen total should match the items (adjust the field below if needed).
services.walletBalanceShort: Wallet balance: {{balance}}. Lower the amount or top up in Wallet.
services.intro: Choose Forwarding or Personal Shopping and send your request. We recommend describing what you will ship to our address (e.g. shop, quantity, item description).
services.noServices: No services available at the moment.
services.descForwarding: Modules: 📦 Standard forwarding | 🛍️ Assisted forwarding + shipping
services.descPersonalShopping: 25% of purchase value + ¥250 per item + shipping — ideal if you need help deciding what to buy
services.itemFeeTable: 1 item: ¥1,000 · 2–4 items: ¥750 per item · 5+ items: ¥500 per item
services.itemFeeWhenP1: In both modules below, the per-item fee (and international shipping) is charged only at the final shipping step, when you request shipping of the package to your address. This form only opens the order; nothing is charged now.
services.itemFeeWhenP2: In Assisted mode, the quote may include prepayment for the purchase in Japan; that is separate from the per-item fee above, which still applies to final shipping to you.
services.standardBody: You buy from Japanese shops and ship to our address. The per-item fee follows the table above; shipping is included in final delivery to your address.
services.assistedBody: {{percent}}% of the purchase value, plus the same per-item fee as above, plus shipping at final delivery. You send the list; we return a quote for prepayment when applicable.
services.purchaseDocsBody: If you already have the invoice or screenshots of the purchase, attach them via upload or send a direct image link. This helps identify what was ordered when the package reaches the warehouse.
services.prohibitedTail: list and confirm I will not send any prohibited items. Prohibited items may be seized without refund.
services.earlyPrepayDesc: For fast-moving listings (Mercari, Yahoo Fleamarket, Rakuma, etc.) you can prepay: put product links in the description, then enter the total product value. We add a {{pct}}% service fee on that amount and debit the total (products + fee) from your wallet when you submit.
services.earlyPrepayHint: Fill the description with links. Below it, enter only the total product value in JPY; we add the {{pct}}% fee and show the amount to be debited.
services.earlyPrepayBalance: Debit occurs when you confirm payment on the order (Orders tab). Available balance: {{balance}}
services.messageLabelShopping: Describe what you want to buy (links, shops, quantity)
services.messageLabelRedir: What will you ship to our address? (recommended)
services.hintShopping: Send your product list, links and references. You can attach images or image links below.
services.hintStandard: Include shop, quantity and description. You may attach invoice, screenshots or image links below (optional).
services.hintAssisted: Include shop, quantity and description to help with receiving.
services.hintAssistedNotes: Build your budget with the links above; add details here (size, color, auction notes, warehouse instructions).
services.placeholderAssistedNotes: E.g. ship together; keep original packaging; anything that does not fit the line items.
services.draftNote: Your text and options are saved automatically on this device; if you leave the page, the draft returns when you come back.
services.placeholderShopping: e.g. Shop X – product link, size M, blue. Or: I want this model (attach image).
services.placeholderRedir: e.g. Amazon JP – 2 books; Rakuten – 1 figure.
services.clearDraft: Clear draft saved on this device
services.refImagesHint: Upload an image file or paste a direct image URL (http or https).
services.successEarlyPrepayLead: To complete prepayment of {{amount}}, open your order:
services.successEarlyPrepayTail: and confirm the wallet debit on the order page.
services.successQuoteBefore: Order sent! You will receive a prepayment quote soon. Track it on the
services.successApproveBefore: Order sent! An admin will approve soon. Track it on the
services.walletDebited: {{amount}} debited from your wallet as prepayment advance.
services.walletErrorBefore: The order was registered, but the wallet could not be debited:
services.walletErrorAfter: or top up the wallet and contact support if needed.
services.budgetSectionIntro: Paste a product link; we fetch the name and price automatically. You can edit or add items manually if lookup fails.
services.budgetManualHint: Use when the site blocks automatic reading or to adjust name/price.
services.budgetPriceMissing: We couldn't detect the price automatically. Enter it in the fields below and add to the list.
services.budgetScrapeError: Could not read this link automatically.
services.budgetFxNote: BRL amounts were converted to yen using the site rate (estimate).
services.budgetOrderFxDisclaimer: (Includes approximate BRL→JPY conversion using the site rate.)

shipments.intro: International shipping only: orders in the international shipping phase (freight, payment, dispatch), consolidations from My Products, and what has already arrived home. All orders stay under the Orders tab.
shipments.loadInventoryError: Could not load items for this request
shipments.reviewRequest: Review the request data and confirm to continue.
shipments.requestSent: Request sent! Our team will review and calculate the final freight + service fees.
shipments.ctaBody: Start a new request so our team can review, consolidate, and calculate freight + fees.
shipments.deliveredIntro: International shipments completed — packages that reached your address.
shipments.processIntro: From the shipping request until the package leaves Japan.
shipments.deliveredEmpty: You have no shipments marked as delivered yet. When a shipment is completed, it appears here.
shipments.noItemsInShipment: No items found for this shipment.
shipments.noInventory: You have no items available to request shipping.
shipments.step2Hint: Items selected in step 1 appear below for declaration.
shipments.customsTeamFill: I want the team to complete the customs declaration.
shipments.customsSelfFill: I will complete the declaration now.
shipments.declarationPerItemHint: Enter description, unit value and quantity for this specific item.
shipments.teamWillDeclareValues: Product values will be provided by the team when completing the declaration.
shipments.noAddressesBefore: No address on file. Add one in
shipments.notesPlaceholder: e.g. prioritize protection for fragile items
shipments.confirmCheckbox: I confirm the data in this request. The team will review and calculate the final amount (freight + service fees).

shippingOrders.title: International shipping orders
shippingOrders.subtitle: Filtered view: only orders in the international shipping phase (shipping status and freight charges). The same orders remain listed under Orders.
shippingOrders.orderNotFound: We could not find that order.
shippingOrders.loginPay: Please sign in again to pay
shippingOrders.empty: No orders in the shipping phase right now. When there are, they appear here and under Orders.

home.heroTitle: Bringing Japan to the comfort of your home
home.heroSubtitle: We connect you to what matters. Our mission is to deliver your orders quickly and carefully.
home.buySubtitle: Product types and where to find them in Japan
home.startSubtitle: A quick guide to get the most from our services
home.guideServicesBody: Forwarding (standard or assisted), personal shopping, group buying, and our online store.
home.guideWhereBody: Japanese shops for forwarding. Buy and ship to our address in Japan.
home.guidePricesBody: Per-item fees, percentages, and shipping. Use the calculator to estimate your order.
home.howSubtitle: Step by step to get started
home.step1Body: Create your free account to access My Products, cart, shipments, and every service.
home.step2Body: Standard or assisted forwarding, personal shopping, group buying, or the online store.
home.step3Body: Pay for products and shipping when quoted. Track everything in Orders and receive at home.
home.doubtsCardBody: Answers about shipping, fees, timelines, and how our service works.

anime.title: Anime & Japanese pop culture
anime.desc: Figures, Nendoroids, and official merch. Your collection deserves the best from Japan.

tcg.title: Trading cards & collectibles
tcg.desc: Pokémon, MTG, Weiss Schwarz, and more. Authentic cards and collectibles that rarely reach Brazil.

cosmeticos.title: Beauty & cosmetics
cosmeticos.desc: From Japan to you. Top skincare and makeup the world wants — safe consolidated shipping.

usados.title: Pre-owned & rare finds
usados.desc: Hidden gems. Discontinued items, rare editions, and bargains you only find in Japan.

stationery.title: Stationery & everyday
stationery.desc: Pens, notebooks, planners, and cute desk items for daily life, with a Japanese-inspired selection.

publicServicos.introBefore: Choose one of our services for a step-by-step guide. Check shipping types and rates under
publicServicos.feeRedirAssisted: 15% of purchase value + same per-item fee as standard forwarding
publicServicos.pricingRedir: Forwarding has two modules — 📦 Standard (tiered per-item fee, see table) and 🛍️ Assisted (15% of purchase + same per-item fee as Standard). Shipping is quoted after consolidation.
publicServicos.pricingPS: 25% of purchase value + ¥250 per item + shipping. This service includes help deciding what to buy.
publicServicos.pricingGrupo: 20% of purchase value + ¥250 per product unit + shipping. Item prices come from each group’s catalog.
publicServicos.pricingLoja: Product price (per item in the catalog) + shipping when you request shipment. Items stay in My Products until you request consolidation.
publicServicos.flowRedirDesc: Shop Japanese stores and ship to our address. Two modules: 📦 Standard forwarding (you buy and ship) or 🛍️ Assisted forwarding (we buy for you, with prepayment).
publicServicos.flowRedirP0: Sign up and receive our Japan address
publicServicos.flowRedirP1: Place orders and ship packages to our address (or send us your list to purchase)
publicServicos.flowRedirP2: We receive and consolidate your items
publicServicos.flowRedirP3: We quote actual shipping — you pay
publicServicos.flowPSDesc: Ideal if you are not sure what to buy and want our team’s help.
publicServicos.flowPSP0: Tell us what you are looking for (style, budget, size, references)
publicServicos.flowPSP1: We suggest options and help you decide
publicServicos.flowPSP2: After you confirm, we purchase from the stores
publicServicos.flowPSP4: We quote actual shipping — you pay
publicServicos.flowGrupoDesc: Curated selections by theme or period. Products created exclusively for each group.
publicServicos.flowGrupoP1: Pick the products you want in the group
publicServicos.flowGrupoP2: Add to cart and check out
publicServicos.flowGrupoP3: Items go to My Products — request shipping anytime
publicServicos.flowGrupoP4: Pay shipping and receive at home
publicServicos.flowLojaDesc: Fixed catalog with set prices. Buy and store until you are ready to ship.
publicServicos.flowLojaP1: Choose products and add to cart
publicServicos.flowLojaP2: Check out (items go to My Products)
publicServicos.flowLojaP3: Request shipping when you want and pay freight

publicFretes.intro: We use Japan Post services for shipping. Pick a service to see sample rates and timelines. The actual freight is quoted after we receive and consolidate your items. The
publicFretes.emsBody: Tracked express air. The fastest Japan Post option. Best for urgent parcels.
publicFretes.parcelBody: For parcels up to 30 kg. Choose a mode:
publicFretes.epacketBody: Small parcels (up to 2 kg) with tracking. Air service, mailbox delivery. Good for light items like apparel and collectibles.
publicFretes.dimNote: Max dimensions: length + width + thickness = 90 cm.
publicFretes.footnoteBefore: Rates may change. Actual shipping is quoted after consolidation. Use the

contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.subtitle: Fill out the form below and we will get back to you soon.
contactPage.name: Name
contactPage.success: Message sent successfully! We will reply soon.
contactPage.errNotConfigured: Form not configured. Add VITE_WEB3FORMS_ACCESS_KEY to .env (get a key at web3forms.com).
contactPage.errSend: Could not send. Please try again.

publicSimulador.title: Order simulator
publicSimulador.subtitle: Add products to calculate the total. Choose final receipt (Brazil, or—if you will be in Japan while your items are in storage—pickup with us or delivery to where you stay), the service, and—if shipping to Brazil—the method below.
publicSimulador.destinoBrasilHint: Japan Post (EMS, Parcel, ePacket) — table estimate below.
publicSimulador.destinoJpWarehouseHint: If you visit Japan while your items are with us, you can pick up at our address; no international postage in this simulation.
publicSimulador.destinoJpTempHint: If you are visiting Japan (e.g. hotel, Airbnb); domestic shipping to where you are staying—freight to be quoted.
publicSimulador.jpWarehouseFreteNote: no international postage in this simulation
publicSimulador.jpWarehouseBody: You are in Japan during the period your purchases are in our warehouse. Pickup or handover at our address does not include Brazil-bound international postage in this total.
publicSimulador.jpTempBody: Same travel scenario: we arrange domestic shipping to your temporary address (e.g. Yamato, Japan Post); amount depends on final weight and dimensions.
publicSimulador.jpEstimateRest: Brazil international or Japan domestic freight is confirmed after consolidation and, when relevant, your travel dates.
publicSimulador.customsJapanNote: The import estimate below applies to shipments to Brazil. If you pick up or receive in Japan during a trip, Brazilian postal-import rules do not apply in this simulation.
publicSimulador.estimateNote: Estimate. This is only an indication. The real freight is known after consolidation, based on actual and volumetric weight of the shipping box.
publicSimulador.estimateRest: This is only an indication. The real freight is known after consolidation, based on actual and volumetric weight of the shipping box.
publicSimulador.empty: No products yet. Fill in the form above to start simulating.
publicSimulador.labelFeeRedirAssistido: Service fee (assisted forwarding — {{pct}}% + same per-item fee as standard)
publicSimulador.customsSubtitle: This step applies a Brazil-side estimate after the base total in yen.
publicSimulador.taxDisclaimerText: This is a public estimate only. Real charges depend on NCM classification, tax treatment, destination state rules, exchange rates, and legal updates.

ondeComprarPage.title: Where to buy
ondeComprarPage.subtitle: Partner stores where you can shop and ship to our address in Japan.
